


--------------------------------------

name
number
Pan file
store Name
Address
email
Business Type
Description
verified [green tick if yes]
suspended [red cross if yes]
revenue [total revenue]
geolocatiuon : string
violations 
    ...violation 1
    ...violation 2
    ...
Update Requested [green tick if yes]
EDIT BUTTON

------------------------------------

- after clicking Edit open below Screen

--------------------------------------

- number _______________
- name ______________________
- description _________________...multiline...
- address ______________________
- geolocation [use autolocation]

Update profile
--------------------------------------

- After clicking update profile show a dialog box to give otp


------------------------------

    OTP _________________
    Okay
--------------------------

- phone number is of 10 digits, keep the check 
- otp is of 6 digits, keep the check
- check email correctness
- from server fetch the options for the Business Type (/api/vendor/businessTypes get)

Then finally show , Success message 

------------------------------

    according to the api message show
    Okay
--------------------------

- after clicking Okay, close the dialog box , return to the dashboard Screen and in profile green tick UpdateRequested and disable edit profile
